jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at CaratLane
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
